summary: A Go-based monolithic tool featuring a test runner, MCP integration, and Goss-to-custom-format migration capabilities.
patterns: Test-driven development with extensive extra tests
concerns: High volume of AI-generated extra tests (glm-agents) may introduce brittle or redundant test coverage
Mixed staged and unstaged modifications suggest incomplete commit workflow
Heavy reliance on internal packages could hinder external reuse or integration testing
suggestions: Audit and consolidate the numerous AI-generated extra test files to eliminate redundancy
Commit or stash the remaining unstaged changes to maintain a clean working tree
Evaluate if the Goss translator can be generalized for other migration scenarios
